moments.title: World Cup: England vs. Croatia
moments.blurb: England faces Croatia in a crucial group stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026, aiming for vital points.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: England vs. Croatia in the World Cup tomorrow! Who are you backing to take the points? #FIFAWorldCup

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival begins on Thursday, bringing a diverse lineup of rock, pop, and electronic artists to Seaclose Park.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Festival season is in full swing! The Isle of Wight Festival kicks off on Thursday. Who's heading down?

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatle and solo artist Sir Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday on Thursday.

angles.name: Beatles Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles track he penned?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Starts
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green transforms for TRNSMT Festival from Friday, bringing major rock and pop acts to Scotland.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibe
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival kicks off in Glasgow this Friday! Who's ready for a weekend of incredible live music on Glasgow Green?

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival wraps up its series of unique open-air concerts in the historic setting on Friday.

angles.name: Last Chance
angles.copy: Final chance to catch a show at the stunning Hampton Court Palace Festival this week! What an incredible setting for live music.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter and 'Hello' hitmaker Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Soulful Celebration
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie on Saturday! What's your go-to track from the legend?

moments.title: Parklife Festival Weekend
moments.blurb: Manchester's Parklife Festival takes over Heaton Park this weekend, featuring a huge lineup of dance, hip-hop, and alternative acts.

angles.name: Manchester Party
angles.copy: Parklife Festival is happening this weekend in Manchester! Who's heading to Heaton Park for two days of massive tunes?

moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, officially arrives this weekend.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the Summer Solstice this weekend! Enjoy the longest day of the year and all that extra daylight. What are your plans?

moments.title: Prince William's 44th Birthday
moments.blurb: HRH Prince William, Prince of Wales, celebrates his 44th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Royal Wishes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 44th Birthday to HRH The Prince of Wales this Sunday!

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic sound, turns 41 on Sunday.

angles.name: Lana Love
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey! Which of her atmospheric tracks is your absolute favourite?

moments.title: Chris Pratt's 47th Birthday
moments.blurb: Hollywood star Chris Pratt, known for his roles in 'Guardians of the Galaxy' and 'Jurassic World', celebrates his 47th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Movie Star Wishes
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday to Hollywood's favourite Guardian, Chris Pratt! What's your top movie of his?

moments.title: Solange Knowles' 40th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist, singer-songwriter, and fashion icon Solange Knowles turns 40 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Solange Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the incredibly talented Solange Knowles on Wednesday! Her music continues to inspire.

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 next Friday. What's your favourite track from the pop icon?
